use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::sync::OnceLock;

struct TemplateEngine {
    templates: HashMap<String, CompiledTemplate>,
}

struct CompiledTemplate {
    name: String,
    bytecode: Vec<u8>,
}

// GOOD: compile on demand, cache compiled result
static ENGINE: OnceLock<TemplateEngine> = OnceLock::new();

fn get_engine() -> &'static TemplateEngine {
    ENGINE.get_or_init(|| TemplateEngine {
        templates: HashMap::new(),
    })
}

fn get_template(name: &str, source: &str) -> &'static CompiledTemplate {
    let engine = get_engine();
    // compile only when first requested
    engine.templates.entry(name.to_string()).or_insert_with(|| CompiledTemplate {
        name: name.to_string(),
        bytecode: compile_template(source),
    })
}

fn compile_template(source: &str) -> Vec<u8> {
    source.bytes().collect()
}
